skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Hurls a blazing sphere at a target location, scorching everything nearby on impact.

skills.name: Holy Aura
skills.description: Radiates divine light that hardens the armor of all nearby allies.
skills.effect: +15 Armor to all allies within range

skills.name: Ice Lance
skills.description: Fires a piercing shard of frost at a single target, dealing ice damage and slowing their movement.
skills.effect: Slows target movement speed by 40% for 3s

skills.name: Shadow Bolt
skills.description: Launches a bolt of concentrated shadow energy that rots from within.
skills.effect: Applies a shadow curse dealing 20 damage over 5s

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Strikes a target with lightning that arcs to nearby enemies in rapid succession.
skills.effect: Bounces to up to 3 additional enemies within the aoe radius, dealing 70% damage per bounce

skills.name: Holy Nova
skills.description: Releases a burst of holy energy that sears nearby enemies and mends allies.
skills.effect: Heals all nearby allies for 30 HP

skills.name: Earthquake
skills.description: Slams the ground with overwhelming force, sending shockwaves across a wide area.
skills.effect: Stuns all enemies in the area for 1.5s

skills.name: Poison Cloud
skills.description: Conjures a spreading cloud of toxic fumes that lingers on the battlefield.
skills.effect: Deals 15 poison damage per second for 5s to all enemies inside the cloud

skills.name: Life Drain
skills.description: Siphons the vital essence from a target, healing the caster with stolen life force.
skills.effect: Heals the caster for 100% of damage dealt

skills.name: Frost Nova
skills.description: Explodes with freezing energy in all directions, flash-freezing nearby enemies.
skills.effect: Freezes all enemies in range for 2s

skills.name: Divine Shield
skills.description: Surrounds the caster in an impenetrable barrier of holy light, briefly making them untouchable.
skills.effect: Caster becomes immune to all damage for 3s

skills.name: Battle Cry
skills.description: Lets out a ferocious roar that fills nearby allies with battle fury.
skills.effect: +20 Attack to all nearby allies for 8s

skills.name: Vampiric Aura
skills.description: Pulses with dark energy, granting all nearby allies a portion of each blow as stolen life.
skills.effect: +10% Lifesteal to all allies within range

skills.name: Enrage
skills.description: When cornered and bloodied, this unit snaps into a frenzied state of heightened aggression.

skills.name: Iron Skin
skills.description: Years of combat have left this unit's hide as tough as forged iron.

skills.name: Berserker
skills.description: Every kill feeds a bloodlust that sharpens reflexes to a razor's edge.
skills.effect: +0.3 Attack Speed for 3s on each kill, stacks up to 5 times

skills.name: Arcane Surge
skills.description: Channels raw arcane energy into a devastating multi-target blast.

skills.name: Cursed Ground
skills.description: Infuses a patch of earth with shadow corruption that weakens all who stand on it.
skills.effect: Enemies in the area have -15 Defense and take 10 shadow damage per second for 6s
